reviews.review_text: Stayed recently for 5 nights with our 2 adult children. Its such a beautiful location and the cabins are perfect. We recommend this place to everyone.
Loved out stay here, would come back.

Powered caravan site was the most we have ever paid, twice that of equal parks.It does Albany a disservice, we will never stay here again or any other Big 4 parks. My wife and I have been caravanning permanently for 4 years and although this park is well located and serviced well, it is way overpriced.
Right at the beach, clean and friendly staff.  Very nice place.
It was a place I stopped by during a road trip in a camper van, and the facilities were so good and clean that I extended it for another day!

Amazing place, exotic beach access, decent sized villas/chalets. The leisure room has pretty fun activities, along with swimming pool.
Will definitely visit again!
Indeed the best park and the services offerred are far better than competitors. We loved everything during our stay except few giant lizards walking around the tent ;)

We have camped at Middleton a couple of times - we love it. Falling asleep to the sound of the waves, easy access to the Campers Kitchen, locked fridges with access codes, kids club every day with different activities, playground and bouncing pillow and can't forget the spa and pool!

Great location in Albany right next to the beach.  Very well kept park with excellent amenities. Very friendly staff. Just thought it was a bit pricey for the ensuite powered site we had, otherwise it would be a five star review.
$94 a night for a unpowered site, when did this even started to happen? Isn't it out of mind?? And it's JUST Albany for COL

Great position on the beach. Pool needs to have better signage on depth
The bathroom facilities were very ordinary Considering they charge over $100 per night. It’s about time you updated your showers and toilets
Nice caravan park. Great location. Good facilities

From start to finish our experience was fantastic. The staff, from booking in, ground staff and the general feel of this park was amazing. We travel a lot, and over many years, and I can say that every park across Australia could learn from these guys. It simply has been the best experience we have had, very well done. Harold.

Our first time in WA, Albany and we are in love. Thank you Big 4 Middleton Beach Holiday Park for such an amazing experience, hospitality and friendly atmosphere. Can’t wait to visit again and we will definitely be back.  Highly recommend you stay here

hubby and I enjoyed our stay at your holiday park. The layout of caravan spaces  and park homes/villas  was great. great to see an amenities room for kids and adults, the pool table, table tennis table, pool, spa. also outdoor adult space for gatherings.

We have been travelling here for 6 years.  The price gouging by the new owners is beyond belief.  Similar accommodation at the other camp site on albany beaches is substantial less (over $200 per night cheaper).

Sad to say,  we won't be back at these prices.

The accommodation is ok. But nothing flash for the prices charged.

Location is great

This park is not bad and we've been to it probably at least 5 times in the past. However, this review is based on rebooking. I've just received a quote for $11241 for a 9-day stay over Christmas. I understand it's peak season, but the same units were $800/night in 2025 which in my opinion was already overpriced. Nothing particularly wrong with the park or units, but I wouldn't even pay or justify the $800/night let alone the $1250/night price gouging (discounted apparently as a returning customer!!!!). I've sent them an email to express my disappointment. These prices are apparently set by management and not Big4 as a group as they are individually owned. They can therefore do what they want, but I think the word extortion is coming to mind and I will never set foot there again. If they think they are on par with luxury overseas holidays like the Maldives or New York (flights included) then I wholeheartedly hope they come to a sober realisation to go back to the drawing board. If you've never been to this park before, please don't let the new prices mislead you to think it's something extraordinary or that you are missing out on something. In my opinion, it's pure greed and nothing more than that. The park is not even secure and we've had thefts on multiple visits during peak times as anyone can come in from both the main entrance as well as the ocean side, which is what happens.

We have stayed at Big 4 Middleton Beach every January for the last 6 years and have had a wonderful time. It's in an excellent location and the park itself is clean and great for families. Previous staff have always been welcoming and kind. Unfortunately, the park was recently taken over by new owners who have increased prices beyond what I feel is reasonable for a stay and we won't be going back.
Previously we have paid around $3000 - $3300 for 7 nights in a chalet for 4 people. We understand that price hikes happen and have accepted these at around the 5 - 7% increase every year.
We recently got our quote for the same chalet for exactly the same dates in Jan 2026 and they are asking $679 per night for a total of $4543 for the 7 nights. This is around a 38% price increase.
We contacted Big 4 as initially we thought they had made an error, but upon discussing with friends who holiday at the same time (you meet wonderful people over years of staying at the same place), they have all received increases ranging from 32% to 55%, making a stay in Albany prohibitive for most people. The new owners suggested that we come in the off season when it is cheaper which is obviously not an ideal solution when you have school aged children.
But, if price is not a concern, then this park is great. Wonderful pool and spa area and most of the other visitors are friendly and nice. Don't leave items out on your deck or unlocked though as thefts happen quite frequently.
Amenities were very well looked after. Location is 10/10 a few steps from the beach. Camping sites have a decent size and nice ground for camping. Prices above the average but would stay again
We had 4 nights in a beach house and it was magnificent. Shoutout to Reece, who was the most welcoming, kind, and capable maintenance worker ever

Top gepflegt und freundlich!
Super Lage am Strand!
Würde die Spa Villa jederzeit wieder buchen!

We been coming  here  in caravan  for 6 years
Noticed  a few disappointment s Spa hours have changed
Closed at 8
00 pm and water temp not hot anymore
Also had 7pm to 9 pm no kids .not no more .Prices gone sky high .Very sad its got new management
These are not improvements  bring back old management and improve

Not no more

It's an excellent and beautiful holiday park, though for the high prices charged it should be outstanding, which it isn't (aside from the location).
I was more than happy with the facilities, but it's over-priced for what it offers. It's a nice, comfy Prado with a Ferrari price tag.
If the price doesn't deter, then I recommend it.

I booked a Christmas holiday at this park in July 2025 for 7 Nights over two powered sites, one for my parents and one for myself and my two Dachshund dogs.

When booking I selected 2 dogs in the booking form, but when it came to proceeding it omitted the dogs from my booking, after a few attempts I decided to type in the notes section that I was bringing with me two Dachshund dogs.

The following day I called the Middleton Beach Park to confirm they had received my book-in and that they could see that I would be bringing my two dogs as noted on the form. I spoke with the lady who answered the phone and she confirmed that they had received my book in request and she could clearly see on the notes that I was bringing my dogs and that was fine, she even mentioned that I would need to pay a pet fee bond. I agreed that was fine and continued confidently that I had everything covered and could proceed to make final payment and prepare for my trip in December.

I made the final payment as per the request on the 27th November.

However, upon arrival 5 months later and having paid in full for all sites, I was informed at the check in counter that pets were not permitted during the holiday season. I explained that I called ahead and had noted this in my book in notes, I was told that they could see this is the notes but that they do not read the notes, leaves the question why have the provision if they go unread!
I was also told their staff would not have told me what I had claimed, as they are aware of this rule! The assumption that I was lying was not justified. I would not have travelled from Perth fully loaded to camp for 7 nights with dogs in tow and the expectation to pay a pet bond, who would? Not to mention my elderly parents had towed a van down and prepared for the stay.

There was no offer of assistance to find us alternative accommodation, no offer of allowing us to even park up for the night to see what we could find as alternative accommodation. No assistance whatsoever, and when I requested a refund, I was told that was not possible.

Big 4 spend enormous amounts on marketing and promoting family friendly sites, however our experience has been anything but horrific. the customer service was non existing and frankly rude. The reference to refer to the Terms and Conditions in the booking was last minute and should have been made more clearly identifiable given we had booked at the peak season.
Any bookings to be made during peak times should clearly identify the change in your booking conditions far more clearly and be acknowledged, not assumed we would need to scroll through endless online information to identify they are changing their terms at Peak times. Especially since I went to the effort of calling and discussing in person.

we luckily found another park (Happy Days) who were very accommodating friendly and a true joy.

We will never use Big4 again.

The park is well situated with walking tracks top the beach and close proximity to the shopping precinct. The sites are concreted level and roomy with the tractor service, if required, to position your van. We didn't stay in the rooms/cabins. Good BBQ and camp kitchen facilities (several BBQs located around the site. Great pool and spa. The staff are very friendly and helpful. We will stay here again.

Wonderful Holiday Park in Albany. Lovely green sites with very attentive staff attending to all sites following guest departures. It's obvious they care. Very clean facilities. Great pool and BBQ areas. Highly recommended and we will definitely return.
Great stay  very quiet and enjoyable experience.  Quick access to the beach.⛱️

An amazing caravan park. So close to the beach.
Amazing and accommodating staff.
Thank you

We absolutely love this park, its now one of our all-time favourites. The team take great pride in this park and it shows - beautiful green grass sites, tidy and well-appointed cabins, neat ensuite sites and clean facilities. Further, the staff are very friendly, the entertainment for kids is top notch, the heated pool/spa are a delight, the big family bathroom with a big bath was awesome, the little shop has many handy items, beach access is easy, location is fantastic with lots on the to-see and to-do list. I could not fault this place, honestly. Don't hesitate to choose this park, you will love it. We will be back!
The Beach house was fantastic. Great park, lovely vibe!
Amazing experience..close to amenities..friendly helpful staff..kid friendly, pet friendly & beautiful scenery..highly recommend it👍🙏

When we reached albany it was already midnight and the hotel we booked was not opening the door so we came here by a accidentally and ( Laura ) was on the reception and she helped us to get a villa. We were 7 people in total and our experience was absolutely mind blowing.

Things i love most

1.   The staff was absolutely respectful, professional, helpful and lovely. ( Thanks Laura for helping us you are best✌🏻)
2.   Villa was very spacious and neat. It comes it Ac rooms, utensils, blankets( all fresh ).
3.   View is absolutely amazing with see just on front door and the whole park is so peaceful loved it.
4.  The facilities like spa, swimming pool, gaming and BBQ were exactly on the perfect spot and was very neat and clean ( pools are not heated thoa
I would like to say totally worth staying and really affordable prices ( thanks laura and team👍🏻😁)

Big 4 Middleton holiday park is a great place to stay. My kids loved the pool and spa but it was a bit a cold to swim. The jumpy pillow was nice, but very loud. The only problem is the ants, they were everywhere. Apart from that it was amazing!
Great clean facilties with a short walk to the beach. Thank you.

Fantastic stay. Great facilities and walking distance to a main beach in Albany. Also a huge shoutout to one of the groundskeepers, Paul. He saw we needed help with our grey water tank today and came over to help us out (plus travel recs!!). Wonderful stay overall. Thank you.
Make sure to lock your car and put all your belongings safe as the camping is being visited at night time and management will probably do nothing to improve safety (CCTV, locked gate ,…)
Location is superb and everything about Big 4 Middleton Beach Albany is 5 star.

I stayed a week at Big 4 Middleton Beach and had a fantastic time. The team was friendly, the place was clean, and the gardens were amazing. It’s only a two-minute walk to the beach straight from the beach house.

I had an issue during my stay, but the manager sorted it out so well that I went from angry and frustrated to extremely happy. Don’t hesitate to bring any concerns to their attention they’re keen to fix things and make sure you have a great stay.

Overall, I had a really, really good time and would 100% go back again.

Well kept in good location for Albany. Only downside is the incredibly tricky spots to get your caravan into if you're unlucky enough to get the outer edge of the streets. Even middle is tough if there are cars opposite. Otherwise, just a regular well kept van park

Excellent location for a well maintained and operated holiday park.
Recommended when you are visiting Albany.
Had a great time, amazing location. The cabin was well equipped, staff friendly and helpful. I’d stay there again.

BIG4 Middleton Beach Holiday Park is an excellent place to stay. The grounds are clean and well maintained, the staff are consistently friendly, and the location is genuinely beautiful with direct access to the beach and great walking paths. The facilities are modern and tidy, making it easy to relax and enjoy the stay.

The only downside was a strange, continuous noise at the site area that went on for long periods. It wasn’t enough to ruin the experience, but it was noticeable.

Overall, a very good holiday park in a stunning location. I would happily stay again.
Well organised. The Mrs is happy and enjoyed our time here.  Onwards to Adelaide.
Lovely accommodation in a beautiful area. Easy to travel around and see other beautiful beaches.
Awesome family holiday. So much to keep the kids occupied

Excellent sized sites. Powered. Water
Friendly staff. Had 2 nights.  Well worth it
Camp kitchens, toilets and showers.
Great place to spend your night after a long drive 😊👍

What a great place. Highly recommend the place. We stayed in a 3-bedroom unit, and it was very clean, and all the necessary facilities were available. The 2nd floor overlooking the sea; can you ask for anything more?

We are spending a night at a powered site. Booked in late but absolutely amazing staff and hospitality. Couldn't find a friendlier face to be at reception. Friendly and definitely plenty of advice about local sights and such. Beautiful and clean park, clean amenities AND there's a rec centre with a spa! What more could you want after a day of travel. Recommend Big4 Middleton Beach 110%

After nearly a month on the road, we've seen them all, but without doubt this is the best caravan park we've stayed at. From Philip at the front desk to the park staff, all were great, friendly and helpful. The amenities were spotless and functional. We felt very safe and secure. Because it's located right on a beautiful beach, we were able to drift off to the mesmorismic sound of those melodious waves. How good.
Beautiful Location right at the beach. Rather expensive for an unpowered tentsite (AUD 60!) - therefore very poorly equipped campers kitchen.
Best caravan park in Albany

A wonderful relaxing stay at beautiful Big 4 Middleton Beach. This is by far the best holiday park we have stayed at on our travels.  It is definitely not one of those huge overcrowded parks and is beautifully set out and well maintained with lovely plantings.  The lovely swimming pool and children's play area as well as the recreation room are grouped together and are away from the cabins which ensures those who want some privacy and quiet are provided the opportunity to enjoy that.
On arrival the staff were helpful and friendly as were the maintenance staff we met throughout the park.

We stayed in a Spa Villa which was spotless and contained absolutely everything we needed for our week long stay. Honestly we could not fault this accommodation. It seemed that the guests comfort has been meticulously considered.

The holiday park is long and narrow So caravans are mostly placed in rows of no more than three which means the van spaces do not look overcrowded, nor packed like sardines. There are also ensuite sites and grassy camp sites, again all very well maintained. Great  amenities and camp kitchens too.

From the park there are walkways through to the stunning Middleton beach. Such a perfect location.
We cannot thank the staff enough for such a lovely relaxing stay.  Will highly recommend!
Lovely clean tidy park to stay at and close to major shopping and attractions. Park patrons and staff Lovely to deal with they could not be more helpful Thank you.
Immaculate sites with concrete slab for van and annexe. Grass for vehicle besides awning. Well designed, clean and well managed, a total pleasure to stay here.

Big 4 Holiday Park/Caravan Park at Middleton Beach, has been very accommodating and great to stay at. The facilities are clean and great to use. The outdoor kitchens, fire place in an enclosed room to keep warm, and how about the new kitchen appliances! Thankyou as they are muchly appreciated from the guest that use the camp kitchens, just wanted to say thankyou!
What better place than being on the beach for your holiday stay! And well this is place to stay! Friendly staff and will do anything to help and support any questions you may have and will help with your van if your not sure how and or what to do and or fix. They are great people and what a great park to be at. Very lucky 😊
Beautiful spot and the room is excellent, would definitely recommend to any family that's wishing to visit Albany

Great location, great town, plenty to see and do. We should have stayed longer.
Like a lot of caravan parks the amenities need to be improved, larger shower areas and consistent hot water.
Over priced for the state of the amenities.

All facilities are well  maintained and the spa is
a welcome extra for us . Best Big4 yet!
Not far from the beach, awesome location, friendly staff, and very helpful
They call this a premium park but we felt there was nothing premium about it compared to others - maybe the location. For the price I would have expected more in the facilities (bathrooms).
Really clean, well equipped, great position,  comfortable beds, quiet despite being busy. Highly recommended.

Great park well presented
Great everything
Thankyou

Unlike some caravan parks where you can feel like a canned sardine, this was spacious with good and clean amenities and a generous camp kitchen.  All staff were friendly and helpful.  Beach access was very easy and close. However cafes and eateries etc were not that close.

Called and spoke with Raj, he reckoned we had to stay a minimum 4 nights, then he double checked then he stated it was 5 nights, I asked him to double check as haven’t heard of that before with a BIG4 park, he came back to me with a 7 night minimum stay. When we first called up we explained we needed only 3 nights for a caravan site (powered) during the Wednesday-leaving Friday morning. Thanks for the help Raj.
Clean park.  Pool, spa, kids playgrounds and fire place with wood supplied.
fantastic

Lovely caravan park but unfortunately spoilt by a repair issue. At 7.30pm on 15 May there was an issue with the lock in the only ladies' ablution, it was jammed and with a full park there was no option for ladies to shower or use toilets. My wife and other ladies reported the matter to the duty manager who said repair staff went home at 7.00pm and there was no standby staff to repair the lock and park residents would have to wait until the morning. At 9.00am the following morning the door issue had still not been resolved. My wife returned to reception and the gentleman reluctantly gave my wife the code for the disabled toilet/shower. The lock was repaired an hour later. For a premium park, charging a premium price this is not good enough. Apart from that matter park facilities are superb.

Be careful with their cancel policy. Originally booked for 5 days and wished to change to 3 days. Was told that they would not alter our booking because you needed to cancel 30 days notice. We only booked 10 days ago. We were not cancelling, we arrived and only wanted to alter booking. I am sure if I wanted to extend my stay they would have no had a problem.
Hmmm. Certainly learnt a lesson.

We had a powered 9m caravan site, this park is in a great position only a couple of minutes to town,
Seperate hot spa room, large pool, camp kitchen, nice clean amenities, dump point, good size sites, walk straight over the dune to the beach, would highly recommend.
We got the beachfront house, clean and had everything we needed.
Absolutely beautiful place to stay. Lovely staff. A very well run organised Holliday Park. 💯 will recommend and come back. Very kid friendly
We all had an amazing time. The kids loved the kids club, playground and pool.

Lovely short walk through the sand dunes to the beach. Its Albany so the weather is crap but the nature is beautiful down here and probably one of the best caravan parks I have stayed at. Heated spa is great, rec room and outdoor area for the kids and staff are really friendly. Cabins are nice and comfy.

We initially baulked at the price but the facilities, activities and service were worth every cent. Our grandchildren had the best holiday! The kids club caters for all ages and everything was so well maintained. Fantastic place to stay with the family in the school holidays. We'll be back.

Great Spot!!
Very friendly staff, Neat and clean ensuite Site. Right next to Beach. They have Spa, and small cute pool. Also have gaming Room for kids. PHILIP was very helpful.
Dont look for anywhere else unless you dont find anything here.
Great staff, awesome location

Booked with friends for 5 nights of camping and could not fault it! The grounds were beautiful and well maintained, the sites were spacious, there was never a queue for the bathrooms or camp kitchen and the water is super hot, all the staff were delightful and in the evenings it is the quietest campground we have ever been to! The kids had the best time, there is so much for them to do - 2 playgrounds, heated pool & spa, theatre and games room, go-carts, beach, nocturnal native animals to spot in the trees at night...and it is such a great location for exploring the area. We were all very impressed, thanks for a great stay!
Great facilities - something for everyone. Very clean and looked after area close to beaches, shops, ANZAC memorial etc. Excellent base and large space for our camper.

I wouldn’t come back and stay. We didn’t enjoy the cabin at all. Really needs an update and Refresh… Our room absolutely smelt so bad when we first arrived, had to leave all the windows open for ages to air it out. Our door lock was horrendous it took us ages to lock and unlock the door and the gauze door didn’t lock at all as it was broken. It was way over priced for what it was, I would expect more paying that price.
Location was kind of nice. However, I wouldn’t say the beach access was really good.
The staff at the desk were fabulous and friendly.
Easy to drive around. Price is a little high but you get what you pay for. Spa, swimming pool. Short walk up a path to the beach. If you have children good play ground

Fantastic Caravan Park highly recommended

Great for kids so much to do, the staff are very happy and helpful

Great location close to several attractions and shops.

We had an ensuite site very clean, was great to have access to our own shower and loo, an awesome option for those longer visits.

We will definitely visit again

Thank you
Everything was good. No complaints.

Check in was pleasant and fast, when we arrived at our cabin the gardens were stunning and gave the place a great feel.
The cabin was well maintained and spotlessly clean, attention to detail 10 out of 10.
When you want the best this is the spot.

Lynton Brown

Everytime we go for holiday in albany we stay in Big4 Middleton beach holiday the staff was so very friendly, the amenities are well maintained. the campground was so quiet and peaceful and couples of miters away from the beach.

As a first-time camper, we couldn’t have asked for a better introduction to the experience than Middleton Beach Caravan Park. From the moment we arrived, I was impressed by the beautifully maintained grounds and spotless facilities. The bathrooms were immaculate—something any camper can appreciate—and the lush gardens added a touch of serenity to the park.

The location is unbeatable. Just a few steps from the beach, it offers the perfect blend of convenience and coastal charm. Being so close to Albany’s attractions made exploring the area effortless, but honestly, I could have happily spent all my time right here.

The true magic, though, was falling asleep each night to the sound of the ocean. If you love the rhythmic lullaby of waves, this place is pure bliss. Whether you’re a seasoned camper or just starting out, Middleton Beach Caravan Park is a gem worth experiencing.

Campground war i. O.
Personal sehr freundlich.
Stellplatz mit Betonplatte.
Toiletten/ Waschräume sehr alt. Sauberkeit aber i. O.
Campingküche ist ein Witz. BBQ-Stationen sehr dreckig.
WLAN leider auch hier kaum nutzbar.

We had a great stay here
Clean and tidy , great facilities, lovely sites.
Friendly staff.

Perfect position right on the water. Easy access to the beach and a great walk along the boardwalk.
Close to the cafe's restaurant and Tavern.
I liked everything, great hotel, quiet and calm, ocean nearby, clean rooms. One wish for management - improve Wi-Fi
Fabulous location and beautifully kept grounds. Staff were friendly and very accommodating at short notice. Highly recommended.
Very pleasant stay, good facilities.

The facilities are fantastic and the staff next level exceptional! Have bent over backwards to help us out when. We got stuck with car troubles. The front of staff ladies are all fantastic and the groundskeepers also fantastic! Even moved our van for us and let us check in early. Cannot say enough good about this place!!
Such a short walk through the dunes to the beach also!

The caravan park was lovely, the facilities were clean, location was great as it was right on the beach and close to town. Pool is heated, easy walking distance for food and drinks if needed and reception has lots of info about things to do in and around the town. Highly recommend a stay here.
Excellent park in a excellent location right at the sea front

My wife and I stayed in number 5,2 storey beach house on Friday it was the best getaway and accommodation was fantastic.I would recommend the beach houses to everyone,accommodates 4 adults and 4 children,great amenities the kids will love it.Perfect view overlooking the ocean.Thanks Geoff and Melissa.

Nos alojamos en cabañas que son sumamente cómodas y están impecables, la cocina tiene todo lo que se necesita para cocinar. Las camas y almohadas cómodas, el baño amenitis individuales de shampoo acondicionador cofia se baño y jabón en pastilla.Los espacios comunes muy bien cuidados , jardines con exuberante vegetación y salida directa a una amplia playa con olas suaves linsisima. Los niños juegan en las calles desde las 6:30 de la mañana y están todo el día por ahí por lo que no es un lugar silencioso. Se van a dormir alrededor de las 21. Desde ahí y hasta las 6:30 se descansa bien.

Once again we had have a wonderful holiday at BIG4 Middleton Beach Holiday park.The staff are amazing helpful and friendly .The house are clean and the locations is just beautiful .
This is why we continue to come back year after year,
Thank you very much
Can’t wait to come back !

This holiday park sets the benchmark. Not our first visit as we’ve rented chalets in the past. First time for a powered site. Lots of grass. Amenities are spotlessly maintained and well located throughout the park. Absolutely perfect if traveling with kids especially as there is a pool and recreation room. Middleton Beach is just a short walk through the dunes where there is also a netted swimming area. Plenty to love.
Location, location,well maintained, friendly staff, great amenities!

Beautiful, well set caravan park. Excellent facilities, heated pool and spa, a great playground for children and games room older kids. Walk ways straight onto the incredible beach. Walking distance to cafes and a great tavern.

Great campground. More expensive than the competition but worth it. Amazing staff..Meaning very helpful, very focused on providing a great customer experience.
Definitely worth the premium price!

We have stayed at this Big4 caravan park before and it never fails to impress. It has everything for adults and kids that you would need to keep entertained. The amenities are excellent and the entire compliment of staff are great including gardeners.
Very well maintained, great facilities and friendly staff
Wonderful location with direct access to the beautiful beach. Loved the spa.
Great place for beach activities
Its Ok
Great location, being right on the beach. Staff were great and recommended some great restaurants.
Loved this Holiday Park and would highly recommend it to everyone. Excellent location, facilities, very friendly staff and right on the beach.

Amazing place to stay. The cabin was great. The kids loved sharing a room with bunk beds. We have made use of the rec room, playground, jumping pillow, movie hire, go kart hire and pool and spa! Right on the beach ment we could have nice night beach walks! Plenty of things to do here and in the surrounds! Staff at reception have been super friendly every interaction! Will definitely visit here again!

We love the chalet like concept as we have most of our meal settled, since there were a clean kitchen, it has beautiful beaches within walking distance which we have caught 2 magnificent sunrise in winter was considered lucky, staff where very warm welcoming and helpful, certainly a place that we will revisit.

Fantastic location great sites had a lovely stay. Great amenities and so close to beach and everything else  we needed
Will be back !!
this is a “high end” holiday park. The facilities and sites are of high quality and very tidy. Of course you pay for what you get.
Good clean accommodation
I called short notice needing somewhere to stay and park my boat overnight and the staff were so helpful and it wasn't a drama. Awesome park to its really nice

I had an absolutely fantastic stay at BIG4 Middleton Beach Holiday Park! From the moment I arrived, I was blown away by the stunning location right by the beach. The spa and swimming pool were perfect for unwinding, and the beach itself was truly breathtaking. The staff were incredibly friendly and helpful, making me feel right at home. The accommodation was top-notch – I slept comfortably and everything was impeccably clean. I can't wait to return – BIG4 Middleton Beach Holiday Park has definitely won me over! Highly recommended for anyone looking for a memorable getaway.

I would like to acknowledge the groundskeeper and the maintenance person. The gardens are lovely, Chalets are modern,  stylish and thoughtfully arranged. The cleaners are also good - never stayed in a chalet so immaculate. The reception staff friendly. And we loved seeing a resident bandicoot.
Good little park, amenities were clean, plenty of washing line.
Rooms were fantastic and the location couldn't have been better. Falling asleep to the sound of waves crashing was one of the highlights of the trip.

Couldn't recommend Big4 Middleton Beach enough.

Staff went over and beyond to ensure everything was smooth, all staff are very attentive and it shows everywhere in the park.

The grounds are immaculate and very easy to get around. Having the beach out the back of my villa was fantastic.

The villa had everything that you need, so clean inside and outside. The bed was one of the best I've slept in, so so comfortable and relaxing.

Enjoyed my stay that much I booked another week for June before I left.

Stayed at an unpowered site. It was $69. I’d say it worth it for location and clean amenities. There was a spa and games room too!
There was beach access right near our site. The place was well kept and staff were friendly. We liked the cafe three anchors a short walk away.
Great camping ground. We used one of the beach cabins and it was fantastic. Good parking, very clean and tidy accommodation with everything you could need.

We stayed in a cabin which was nice and clean
And the staff were lovely.
Very expensive though for a couple the most expensive accommodation on our 3 week stay in WA staying in accommodation everywhere.
A bit clinical for us. No extras like paper towel, just the basics. Not much atmosphere but close to great places
Very clean and tidy caravan park with short walk to the beach.  Quiet location too.
Yet again enjoyed en suite powered caravan site. Great location.  Top staff . Stunning location landscaping.  Can't recommend more highly
Great place 50 m from the beach. Everything you need is provided
It's located right in the Middleton Beach ⛱️,  it's very peaceful and quiet, great for families with little children. The place are clean and easy access to the beach

Fantastic big 4 , great amenities, friendly staff. Only issue that is concerning is the children on scooters which needs to be managed and or a scooter ban for safety reasons. A young child rode out in front of our vehicle which we almost hit at the front entrance . she was approximately 6 years old, not wearing a helmet and unsupervised by an adult. All parks need stricter rules regarding scooters .it’s only a matter of time someone will get injured.
Awesome park, really good location, walk to or ride a hire scooter to lots of great places to eat and drink.
Great van Park extremely clean facilities great friendly staff happily go back there..
great seaside park...walk to town or anzac park if keen...Middleton beach is delightful and theres plenty of food and bars within walking distance..

I did a two day stay there quite recently, Me and my family departed this morning and it was pretty good.

A clean and tidy caravan park with super quick access to the beach, a payphone on site, had heated spa/pool, a recreation room and lots of cabins/campsites, chalets, beach houses and super easy to navigate.

We were given wristbands and a map when we checked in as soon as we arrived and went exploring.

When I went to go on the jumping pillow yesterday, I was told to put on a wristband by a staff member so I went, got it and put it on.

I’m not even from Middleton Beach, Western Australia, me and my family road tripped from Elizabeth Downs, South Australia in Northern Adelaide because I was visiting family and was exploring WA other than that, it was pretty good and definitely coming back again.
Well set cabin, close to beach, very busy. Not really walkable to much but beach and 1 restaurant
I like Middleton beach not the caravan park.
Right on the beach, friendly service, great spot.

Stayed here in 2016 after flying over to see my daughters at 3 Anchors by the beach.
Excellent accommodation, right beside the beach and not far from everything local.
Wir waren da mit unserem Van für eine Nacht. Der Park ist sehr sauber und schön. Das Personal ist sehr freundlich. Wir würden sofort wieder da übernachten.

Great location, Wonderful for families. Great heated pool/ spa/ rec room/ playground x2 and bouncing pillow. And was close by to beach and many other playgrounds/ cafes/ bars. The CP in general was well kept with lots of grassy sites. We really enjoyed our stay here and would definitely return :)
Very friendly & welcoming staff.  The grounds are immaculate & clean.  Our cabin was very nice with everything you need to be comfortable.  We’ll definitely be back
Right on the Beach very clean and tidy park

great place and will return. facilities are great except the games room which is a TOTAL disaster and needs some love.

i'd like to see the games room fixed - 50% of the arcade machines were broken charging our kids $2 a game they couldn't even play (should be $1 if that or free to big4 members - place was a tomb over the 3 days we were there) , air hockey is on a slant favouring one side by at least 3 degrees, pool table balls are chipped and cues bubbled (worst I've ever held in my life). when you charge to use something it should be of a decent standard.

Charging $5 to borrow a 10yr old DVD did make me laugh.  $8 for 2......Advice bring a USB-C to HDMI so you can stream your night away for free with free wifi
Very comfortable cabin, the ground and amenities are well maintained, in a great position.

Location location very good facility and all wrapped in a beautiful award winning caravan park and great chalets
Gardens are spectacular and the entire place is a clean as a whistle and so tidy
If you are looking for a large immaculate holiday village this is it
It great value $$$ wise and a friendly atmosphere with very very good staff always prepared to be helpful and courteous
The facility is in a prime location handy to the town beaches snd tourist sites
Book now if you are looking for something special

Stayed as I needed to be in that area. Unfortunately they do not offer unpowered sites so paid a premium for things I don't use. Plenty of communal areas and well looked after facilities and grounds. Great location. Dryer at $7 is the most expressive I've seen and did not use them.
Very well run and maintained park. Excellent staff.
Fantastic location and value for money. Will definitely stay here again.
Beautiful place , even have friendly bandicoots that visit. 😍
I come here with my family basically every year and love and enjoy it everytime

Best experience
Clean rooms all facilities provided
Friendly staff
And if you get the beach houses
You’ll the mesmerising view of the beach
All in all I loved the location and the property

Great holiday park. This is right on the beach.

The park is really well equiped with everything you need to keep yourself and the kids entertained.

Everything is really well looked after and very clean.
A very nice well run caravan park.
Nice park, pretty expensive for winter $50 a night non powered site last month.
Well serviced, clean park.
We rocked up with no reservation, the staff were exceptionally helpful in accommodating us with our long rig.
Beautiful caravan park. Spotless. We stayed in a beach house looking at the ocean. Absolutely gorgeous. Staff helpful with queries. Lovely pool and spa.
Very good place to stay in holidays in Albany. Loved customer service and dealing of Laura receptionist with very good nature
Excellent place to stay at holiday in Albany. Very nice customer service and Laura is best in customer service and dealing
Great location and good service

Great place and staff. Always very clean and nothing is ever a problem for the staff there. The location is perfect, and if you come in whale season you will see mothers with their calf resting close to shore.
Just a beautiful caravan park with clean amenities and easy beach access. The hosts are a joy to deal with  ❤
Loving our stay here. Everything about the park is wonderful
